overview.value: Terran Orbital is headquartered in Irvine, California, and is a manufacturer of satellite products primarily serving the aerospace and defense industries. The company is a Lockheed Martin Company. It provides end-to-end satellite solutions combining satellite design, production, launch planning, mission operations, and on-orbit support.

focus.value: Manufacturer of satellite products primarily serving the aerospace and defense industries

events.headline: Terran Orbital founded by Marc Bell and Anthony Previte in Boca Raton
Terran Orbital demonstrates first nano-satellite docking and builds CAPSTONE
Terran Orbital shares begin trading on NYSE under ticker LLAP
Terran Orbital wins $2.4 billion Rivada Space Networks contract for 300 satellites
Lockheed Martin agrees to acquire Terran Orbital for about $450 million enterprise value
Lockheed Martin completes acquisition of Terran Orbital
